children.name: ValidateAndPrepareSend
children.purpose: Validate that the user is a member of the target channel and prepare the message data for storage.
children.behavior: Check if user_id is in the members list of the channel identified by channel_id from the channels store. If not, return failure. If valid, prepare a message object with content, user_id, channel_id, and current timestamp.
children.signature: def ValidateAndPrepareSend(command: str, message_data: dict, channels: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read channel members to validate membership

data_operations.description: Read channel data to check membership

constraints.description: Must not modify any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns success if user is a member of the channel

children.name: StoreMessage
children.purpose: Store the prepared message in the messages data store.
children.behavior: Insert the prepared message object into the messages store with a new unique message_id.
children.signature: def StoreMessage(prepared_message: dict, messages: Database) -> str

global_vars.description: Write new message to messages store

acceptance_criteria.description: Message is stored and a unique ID is returned

children.name: UpdateUserLastSeen
children.purpose: Update the last_seen timestamp for the user in the users store.
children.behavior: Set the last_seen field of the user identified by user_id to the current timestamp.
children.signature: def UpdateUserLastSeen(user_id: str, users: Database) -> bool

global_vars.description: Write last_seen timestamp to users store

constraints.description: Must not modify other user fields

acceptance_criteria.description: last_seen is updated to current timestamp

children.name: NotifyChannelMembers
children.purpose: Notify all other members of the channel about the new message.
children.behavior: Retrieve the list of members from the channel (excluding the sender) and trigger a notification for each (e.g., via a callback or event).
children.signature: def NotifyChannelMembers(channel_id: str, user_id: str, channels: Database) -> bool

global_vars.description: Read channel members list to notify

constraints.description: Must not modify any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Notifications are triggered for all other members

children.name: RetrieveMessageHistory
children.purpose: Retrieve the last 100 messages from a channel, sorted by timestamp descending.
children.behavior: Query the messages store for all messages with the given channel_id, sort by timestamp descending, and return the top 100.
children.signature: def RetrieveMessageHistory(command: str, message_data: dict, messages: Database) -> list

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns up to 100 messages sorted by timestamp descending

children.name: CreateNewChannel
children.purpose: Create a new channel with a unique name and set the caller as creator and first member.
children.behavior: Check if channel_name already exists in channels store. If not, create a new channel entry with a unique channel_id, set name, members list containing user_id, and created_by as user_id.
children.signature: def CreateNewChannel(command: str, message_data: dict, channels: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read to check uniqueness, write to create new channel

data_operations.description: Check if channel name already exists

acceptance_criteria.description: New channel is created with unique name and caller as member

children.name: JoinChannel
children.purpose: Add the user to a channel's member list if not already a member.
children.behavior: Check if user_id is already in the members list of the channel identified by channel_id. If not, add user_id to the members list.
children.signature: def JoinChannel(command: str, message_data: dict, channels: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read to check membership, write to add user

data_operations.description: Check if user is already a member

acceptance_criteria.description: User is added to channel members list if not already present

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by StoreMessage (write) and RetrieveMessageHistory (read); users (read) covered by UpdateUserLastSeen (write) — note: parent requires only read on users, but UpdateUserLastSeen performs write; this is acceptable as write implies read capability. channels (read_write) covered by ValidateAndPrepareSend (read), NotifyChannelMembers (read), CreateNewChannel (read_write), JoinChannel (read_write). All parent operations are satisfied.
